rationale: CS & AI L5 covers what authors literally cite by name: specific architectures, models, datasets, benchmarks, training tricks, frameworks. Only added where the field publishes by named entity at the leaf level (Mamba, FlashAttention, MMLU, AlphaFold). Skip where L4 is already the named research community.

leaves.tagline: FlashAttention v2/v3, paged attention, memory-efficient attention kernels.

leaves.tagline: Multi-query attention, grouped-query attention, KV-cache-friendly attention designs.

uncovered_concerns: CS L5 will drift fastest — models drop every quarter. Quarterly review recommended.
Did not L5-split every L4. Skipped where L4 IS the named entity (e.g. 'systems & network security' would just enumerate vendor products).
